metadata.name: Add a Pet in Cabin to a Booking

description: A customer wants to add their small dog, which will travel in a carrier under the seat, to their booking.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the booking and check the airline's pet policy, including any flight-specific restrictions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the flight allows pets in the cabin.

nodes.task_description: Check if the flight's quota for in-cabin pets has already been reached.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms there is still space for another pet.

nodes.task_description: Add the pet to the booking, collect the pet-in-cabin fee, and inform the customer of the requirements (e.g., carrier size, health documents).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the pet, takes payment, and provides all necessary information.
